title: Gift Card Networks

narrative: The user is seeking information about multi-brand gift cards available in France, specifically which physical and online retailers accept them, and how to verify their usage scope. Relevance is determined by documents that detail the network of partner stores, geographic coverage, usage rules (online/in-store), and brand compatibility—such as CADO, UpCadhoc, Galleries Lafayette, and Illicado. Documents focused on single-brand gift cards (e.g., Decathlon, Bonobo, Au Vieux Campeur) without multi-brand network integration are not relevant, even if they mention gift cards, because they do not address the user’s need for broad, cross-retailer acceptance.

title: Lamb Tagine

Recipes that substitute lamb with other meats, focus solely on prunes/dates without vegetables, or misidentify the dish as 'lamb mice' are irrelevant.

Irrelevant results include recipes for chicken paupiettes, non-traditional stuffings like mozzarella or pesto without context, or content focused solely on side dishes without the main recipe. Relevance is determined by documents that clearly explain the conditions for exercising this right: at least 130 days (910 hours) of recent work, a minimum 30% increase in daily allowance or a daily allowance of €20 or less, and the irreversible nature of the choice. Documents that only describe general reloading of rights or unrelated topics like health insurance or job center administration are not relevant.
